name: Enchanted Mango
description:
[Github Repo](https://github.com/elsieemorris-ai/benzene-exposure-tool)
This tool estimates indoor benzene concentrations generated by gas stoves using a simple mass‑balance model. It requires user inputs for benzene emission rate, kitchen volume, air exchange rate, cooking duration, and total simulation time. The tool outputs the peak benzene concentration, the total time‑integrated exposure, and a plot showing how concentrations build up during cooking and decay afterward. Users should interpret these outputs as approximate but useful indicators of how ventilation and cooking duration influence exposure, allowing them to compare scenarios rather than determine exact measured concentrations.
